product_overview: CareerConnect is a centralized career management web platform for students and job seekers to discover opportunities, manage profiles, and track applications in one place. It supports live jobs, internships, saved jobs, company listings, and notifications, with Google OAuth and portal-based access for students and admins.
core_goals: Provide secure user authentication and session-based access.
Enable students to browse, search, and filter live jobs and internships efficiently.
Allow users to save jobs and track applications in a centralized dashboard.
Support profile management including skills, education, experience, and resume details.
Provide admin access for placement and student management workflows.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can access the platform securely through Google OAuth and protected sessions, then reach the appropriate portal based on role.
user_flows: GET /google/login -> Receive redirect to Google OAuth consent flow -> GET /google/callback with valid authorization code -> Receive authenticated session and redirect to root /
GET /google/login -> Receive redirect to Google OAuth consent flow -> GET /google/callback with invalid or expired authorization code -> Receive authentication failure and remain unauthenticated
GET / -> Receive root index redirect to the appropriate landing page or portal
GET /student/dashboard without a valid session -> Receive 401 or redirect to login/auth flow

features.name: Student Portal
features.description: Students can view their dashboard after authentication to access jobs, applications, saved items, and related career tools.
user_flows: GET /student/dashboard with a valid authenticated student session -> Receive 200 with student dashboard content
GET /student/dashboard without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized or redirect to authentication flow

features.name: Admin Portal
features.description: Admins can access a protected dashboard for managing placements, students, and other administrative workflows.
user_flows: GET /admin/dashboard with a valid authenticated admin session -> Receive 200 with admin dashboard content
GET /admin/dashboard without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized or redirect to authentication flow

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Google OAuth and traditional login using Flask-Login

features.name: Student Portal
features.description: Dashboard for students to view jobs, apply, etc.

features.name: Admin Portal
features.description: Admin controls for managing placements, students, etc.
